leadText: The Roto Hatch (Japanese: タマゴふかポン Roto Hatch) is a Rotom Power introduced in Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ] When used in the overworld, the number of cycles it takes for all Pokémon Eggs in the party to hatch are halved. This effect stacks with Flame Body or Magma Armor . The effect lasts for 10 minutes.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Bag item [ edit | edit source ] Games Description US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA One of the Rotom Powers. It helps Eggs hatch faster. S V ZA One of the Rotom Powers. When used, it helps Eggs hatch faster.
